Well, fluff's team lacks all of them, and while there are many theoretical ways to stop helot, realistically those options are limited
It's a 3K comp for a reason
Like, it's not impossible, but you need to draw the right skills at the right time
And that's under the assumption they don't run counters themselves, alongside the fact that helot setup is quite fast
So not easy, but plausible with enough luck
And of course if you run a specific anti helot comp, you'd be vulnerable to comps like bleed for instance
So it just depends what tradeoffs you're okay with
depends on the helot comps tbh, helot alone as a damager would never be able to one-shoot the enemies, she needs another damager to wipe out

Like the doresain comp Zyo recommended to me that I used, my sole counter is obtaining doresain aliemus skill card, ready exalt, draw the taunt posse, hope the enemy places the helot wheel onto her premeptively, then taunt target, vulnerable with pandia skill or critical point, and burst helot down
Like so it's a very specific line, but one the opponent would play around
E.g. seeing me setup doresain, and using winkle taunt
Or bursting with helot first, making it not matter as much, and finish with aurita next turn
